landing.title: Nausica
landing.pitch: We detect cognitive distortions in language, condense them into a continuous Cognitive Flexibility Index (CFI), and guide a Socratic reframing dialogue whose success is measured by the CFI trajectory, turn by turn.

how.title: How it works
how.step1: A multi-label classifier (MentalRoBERTa) detects 5 cognitive distortion types from the CBT taxonomy.
how.step2: Probabilities aggregate into the CFI: a continuous cognitive-rigidity scalar between 0 and 1 — not a diagnostic label.
how.step3: A CBT-based Socratic dialogue invites evidence examination. CFI declining turn by turn is the progress signal.

analyze.title: Distortion analysis
analyze.subtitle: Write a thought or text (in English — the models were trained on English corpora) and see its cognitive profile.
analyze.placeholder: e.g. I always ruin everything. Nobody will ever love me…
analyze.empty: The profile will appear here after analyzing.

reframe.title: Reframing dialogue
reframe.subtitle: CBT-based Socratic conversation. The chart shows your live CFI trajectory.
reframe.emptyChat: Share a thought to begin the dialogue.

common.disclaimer: Research prototype — not a medical device or a diagnosis. If you are in crisis, seek immediate professional help.
common.error: Could not reach the analysis server. Check that the API is running.
